Comment.value: ExportDB possible values for Media DB: "Media update", "Media all"
Extend found set with media that does not belong to a specific package

Calculation.Text: Case ( FAT Media::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code Or IsEmpty ( FAT Media::Localisation code ); GetMediaPath ( $dataFileName); GetMediaPathLocalisation ( $dataFileName; FAT Media::Localisation code ) )

Comment.value: ------- Local "Media update" checks modification date on file on disk with BaseElements plugin

Calculation.Text: Not $fileExist Or GetAsTimeStamp (<Function Missing> ( GetPathWithoutVolumeName ( $fullFilePath ) )) < FAT Media::Container modified Or $exportDB ≠ "Media update"

Comment.value: ------- Remote "Media update" checks last exported date in FAT Media table
------- Export Field Contents is not available on FileMaker Server ---------

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Media::Container exported ) Or FAT Media::Container exported < FAT Media::Container modified Or $exportDB = "Media all"

Comment.value: Only set exported for Package media - Title media needs to export each time
Font CSS file

Calculation.Text: $exportDB = "Media all" And Not IsEmpty ( FAT Theme::Fonts CSS file )

Comment.value: ------- Remote "Media update" checks last exported date in FAT Media table
------- Export Field Contents is not available on FileMaker Server ---------
Font files - only exported using Media all

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty(FAT Theme Font::Font File Container)

Comment.value: ------- Export Field Contents is not available on FileMaker Server ---------
--------------- If Subtitle VTT files - all chunks are in one file - cut up and export file by file -------------------------------
For base projests - make package the root

Calculation.Text: FAT Media::Container exported filename no extension

Comment.value: Localised media VTTs needs to be exported in language folder

Calculation.Text: FAT Media::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code

Comment.value: save file
Styles CSS and Fonts are exported together with Media
Theme does also include fonts.css and font files
Write theme.json
IMPORTANT! Don't commit before exporting files - will override files created by server when doing a local export.
For base projects - make package the root

Calculation.Text: "Error: Exported JSON file not found.¶¶File path: " & $fullFilePath
